misc: His usual shot shape could be described as a "power draw".
biography: Jussi, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings a blend of power and precision to the course. Representing St. Laurence Golf, Jussi is known for his powerful draw, a shot shape that allows him to attack pins with confidence. While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his competitive spirit remains undeterred.

With four past appearances at the tournament, Jussi's experience is undeniable. Although he will not be participating in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his presence at future events remains a distinct possibility. Those who know Jussi know that he is as tenacious as they come, and he will always find a way to compete at the highest level!
